commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=383685b34a37988993318b5b32db05f1f2df6d7c)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds source-wide memory embedding batching for opt-in provider runtimes, enables it for OpenAI-compatible memory batches, adds OpenAI batch polling retry/backoff/progress, updates SDK docs, and includes related plus unrelated tests/scripts formatting changes.

PR surface: Source +484, Tests +284, Docs +10, Other +23. Total +801 across 27 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the source-level problem: current main has no `sourceWideBatchEmbed` path and sends each dirty memory/session file through per-file `indexFile` calls, while the PR adds a deferred source-wide path behind an explicit provider runtime opt-in. I did not run the CLI in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The concrete cap/test repairs are clear, but maintainers also need to decide the new plugin runtime contract and whether to keep the unrelated automation churn in this PR.
